name: SHINMEI RYU OUGI: SEN - MESSETSU ZANKUU ZANMASEN (VOICE OF HEAVEN STYLE SECRET SKILL: FLASH - DEMON CRUSHING AIR VOID FLASH)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 16

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 5

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 26

Components: C, E, F, Mob

This technique combines various skills of the Shinmei Ryu styles and has you fire a condensed blast of Chakra.

If you are not wielding the weapon used in two hands, the Perform Requirements increase by 4.

You wave your weapon, sending forth a wave of energy that explodes, dealing 3d6 slashing, 3d6 bludgeoning and 3d6 force damage to creatures within the area.

The blast damages unattended objects and completely ignores cover.

Alternatively, you can make a melee attack against the target, dealing normal damage. The area of the blast will center around the target, but you will be unaffected. If the target was hit, it suffers a -4 penalty to its Reflex save. If the attack missed, the save DC is decreased by 2, and you suffer a -2 penalty to Defense until your next turn.

Empower: Spend 4 Chakra to increase the damage of each type by 1d6, up to a maximum of 5d6 damage per damage type.
